content.text: {"title":"Client deletes user record","slug":"client-deletes-user-record","intent":"An API client needs to remove user records that are no longer needed.","story":"The client sends a delete request for a user identifier.","expected_behavior":"The API deletes the target user and returns a completion response.","boundaries":"This story does not cover authorization rules.","auditable_claims":["The delete user route is user-facing."],"evidence":{"tests":[],"surface":["route: DELETE /api/users/:id"],"docs":[]}}
